---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.png"
  links:
    - icon: facebook
      text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/lily.zhang.167284
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lily-zhang-29b78b257/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto: shitao.zhang@case.edu"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

I am Lily (Shi-tao) Zhang who is trying to be a good bio-statistician. 

My interest in biology began after reading a biography of Jane Goodall. Her lifelong commitment to scientific discovery inspired me to pursue a career in biomedical research. That passion led me to earn a Ph.D. in Biochemistry and Molecular Biology and further continue my research training in the United States.

Throughout my doctoral and postdoctoral research, I became increasingly involved in analyzing high-dimensional biological data. Rather than viewing data analysis as simply a supporting step, I found it to be the aspect of research I enjoyed most. As my research progressed, I realized that rigorous statistical methodology is fundamental to producing reliable and reproducible scientific conclusions. This realization motivated my transition into biostatistics.

To build the necessary expertise, I pursued formal graduate training in bio-statistics. I have developed proficiency in R, SAS, and a wide range of statistical methods, including generalized linear models, survival analysis, and longitudinal and cross-sectional data analysis. I have independently designed data analysis pipelines, produced publication-quality visualizations, and collaborated closely with multidisciplinary researchers to answer clinically relevant questions. I enjoy solving complex analytical problems and transforming data into evidence that informs scientific discovery and clinical decision-making.

On this website, you will find my published works, and also find news and updates on my current research projects. I invite you to explore my website and learn more about me. Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:zlily0049@gmail.com) if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.
